hooks.command: FILEPATH="$TOOL_INPUT_FILE_PATH$TOOL_INPUT_file_path"; case "$FILEPATH" in *.env|*.env.*) echo 'BLOCK: .env files contain secrets — edit manually' >&2; exit 2;; */bun.lock|*/bun.lockb) echo 'BLOCK: Lock files should not be edited directly' >&2; exit 2;; */package.json|*/scripts/download-claude-binary.mjs|*/scripts/download-codex-binary.mjs) echo '⚠️  WARNING: Touching binary version pin file. Confirm Claude 2.1.96 / Codex 0.118.0 are the intended targets — bumping the pin requires re-testing session resume (Claude) or the codex-acp bridge (Codex). See CLAUDE.md Environment Notes.' >&2;; esac

FILEPATH="$TOOL_INPUT_FILE_PATH$TOOL_INPUT_file_path"; case "$FILEPATH" in *.ts|*.tsx) cd /Users/jason/dev/ai-stack/ai-coding-cli && if command -v tsgo >/dev/null 2>&1; then CURRENT=$(bun run ts:check 2>&1 | grep -c 'error TS' || echo 0); BASELINE=$(cat .claude/.tscheck-baseline 2>/dev/null || echo 104); if [ "$CURRENT" -gt "$BASELINE" ]; then echo "❌ ts:check error count increased: baseline=$BASELINE → current=$CURRENT (+$((CURRENT-BASELINE))). New errors:" >&2; bun run ts:check 2>&1 | grep 'error TS' | tail -10 >&2; elif [ "$CURRENT" -lt "$BASELINE" ]; then echo "✅ ts:check decreased: baseline=$BASELINE → current=$CURRENT (-$((BASELINE-CURRENT))). Consider updating .claude/.tscheck-baseline."; else echo "✅ ts:check baseline holding ($CURRENT errors)"; fi; else echo '[hook] tsgo not installed, skipping type check'; fi;; esac
